name: Antique Victorian Mahogany Writing Desk
description: An exquisite example of Victorian craftsmanship featuring intricate carved details and original brass hardware
detailedDescription: This stunning writing desk showcases the finest Victorian woodworking traditions. Hand-carved mahogany with original brass fittings, leather writing surface, and secret compartments. Authenticated provenance and excellent condition make this a museum-quality piece.
condition: Excellent - Minor wear consistent with age
provenance: Originally commissioned for the Ashworth family estate in 1878. Documented ownership through three generations before acquisition.
